full_text:
Ge Xuan 葛玄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ge Xuan (葛玄). One of the founders of modern Daoism. Survived drowning apparently thanks to his advanced breathing methods. Ge Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Ge Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
